repo_prior_art.cite: pid_synth_control_factor_misspec_v1 is adjacent partial-ID factor-misspecification work, not an SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC equality lattice

published_prior_art.cite: DoudchenkoImbens2016 relaxes SCM weight/intercept/regularization restrictions; ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021 and AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 cover SDiD/MC nodes but not the stated certificate chain
none; closest checked papers define or analyze individual SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC estimators, not open-set strict span separations across the chain

none; BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021, ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021, and AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 use different penalty schemes but do not give a shared exceptional equality set

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed inclusion {K_sdid=0} subset {K_rank,R=0} fails as stated: because lambda is unconstrained in K_sdid, any w with nonzero residual x0-X^T w can choose lambda to hit S_R, making K_sdid=0 without rank-completion visibility or uniqueness.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: K_rank,R=0 is defined as an infimum distance to S_R but then interpreted as local uniqueness of the rank-R completion; the displayed functional encodes existence of a rank completion at S_R, not uniqueness.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The strict-lattice conjecture depends on the Theorem 1 lattice order, but the SDiD node is currently too permissive and can collapse the lattice for algebraic reasons unrelated to SDiD's published first-order conditions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Phi_ridge, Phi_sdid, Phi_nuc and 'differ by first order in the penalty limit' are named but not mathematically defined, so the exceptional set and stability claim are not yet precise statements.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace K_sdid with the actual SDiD population first-order system, including normalization and penalty-limit restrictions on unit and time weights, then re-check the SDiD-to-MC inclusion with an explicit counterexample search.
Split rank completion into two predicates: existence of the Schur value and local uniqueness of the completed entry; use the uniqueness predicate in Theorem 1 instead of overloading K_rank,R=0.
Define Phi_ridge, Phi_sdid, and Phi_nuc as explicit finite-dimensional residual maps with dimensions, normalization, and limiting regimes before stating Conjecture 2.
Add a small numeric witness table for each adjacent lattice separation after the SDiD node is repaired, so the open-set strictness claim has nondegenerate anchors.

recommended_next_step: Pivot/redraft the certificate definitions, especially the SDiD and rank-completion nodes, before any Stage 0 derivation attempt.
